title: Moroccan Green Bean Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful North African stew made with green beans and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using). Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the green beans to the pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until they start to tenderize, about 5 minutes.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the green beans are tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (if desired).
